name: construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processing causes late orders. We convert paper work orders into digital invoices instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
problem_solved: Manual processing of paper work orders leads to delays in invoicing.
features: manual data entry for initial setup

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual processing of paper work orders leads to delays in invoicing.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processing causes late orders. We convert paper work orders into digital invoices instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry into accounting software
must_have_features: manual data entry for initial setup

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processing causes late orders. We convert paper work orders into digital invoices instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
